observers: Phyllis Watkins , Bill Brockner, Mike Krieger
comments: Originally documented as Magnificent Hummingbird; Chair re-circulated in 2012 as Green (Now Mexican) Violetear based on photos provided with original report.
citations: Faulkner, D. The 62nd Report of the CBRC. Colorado Birds 46(2), 106-120.
